checks.expected: passing brief audit, ready state and matching state checksum
checks.message: A changed brief invalidates every downstream data decision.

checks.expected: complete contract, UTC data_as_of and matching upstream project_id
checks.message: The data contract is versioned evidence, not a detached schema note.

checks.expected: each source has policy metadata and known defects are documented
checks.message: A readable CSV is not automatically permitted, reproducible or publishable.

checks.expected: one exact manifest resource per contract table with matching bytes and SHA-256
checks.message: Manifest drift must fail before the data are interpreted.

checks.expected: exact columns, supported values, non-null unique keys and forbidden duplicates
checks.message: Schema and grain are verified against rows rather than trusted as prose.

checks.expected: declared many-to-one relationships with unique parents and zero orphans
checks.message: A valid table grain can still produce an invalid join graph.

checks.expected: no future/stale availability and at least one complete analysis row
checks.message: Incomplete or stale rows stay visible but cannot silently enter analysis.
Experiments, marts, causal studies, forecasts, ML and delivery have different leakage gates.

checks.expected: aggregate-only public sample, minimum group size and forbidden restricted/secret fields
checks.message: A checksum does not grant publication rights or anonymize row-level data.

checks.expected: non-empty aggregate sample with every group at or above minimum size
checks.message: Only a policy-compliant aggregate sample may enter the portfolio package.
